input_text: Memang la kaum tu suka sangat ambil tanah orang. Dari dulu lagi diorang ni tamak, tak pernah cukup. Sebab tu la negara kita tak maju.
reason: Generalizes an entire ethnic group as greedy land-grabbers and blames them for national underdevelopment, promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pemilikan tanah perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang adil untuk semua rakyat tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Boikot semua restoran kaum tu. Jangan bagi diorang untung kat tanah kita. Support bisnes bangsa sendiri je.
reason: Calls for ethnic-based boycott of businesses, promoting economic exclusion along racial lines.
suggested_rewrite: Kita patut sokong semua perniagaan tempatan yang memberi manfaat kepada masyarakat, tanpa mengira latar belakang pemilik.

input_text: Agama diorang tu ajaran sesat la. Tengok macam mana diorang sembahyang, pelik gila. Patut diharamkan.
reason: Mocks and dismisses another religion's prayer practices as deviant and calls for banning them, directly provoking religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia menjamin kebebasan beragama. Walaupun kita tak memahami amalan agama lain, kita perlu menghormati kepelbagaian ini.

input_text: Sebar gambar ni viral. Ni dia orang yang hina Islam kat FB. Biar semua tahu muka dia dan keluarga dia tinggal mana.
reason: Encourages doxxing by sharing personal information and location of someone accused of blasphemy, inciting mob vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada sesiapa yang menghina agama, laporkan kepada SKMM atau pihak polis. Jangan sebar maklumat peribadi kerana ia boleh membahayakan keselamatan orang tersebut.

input_text: Kaum pendatang ni memang suka rogol anak kita. Dah berapa kes dah? Kena halau semua balik negara asal.
reason: Falsely generalizes that immigrants are sexual predators targeting local children, spreading dangerous misinformation and communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu jenayah seksual perlu ditangani tegas tanpa mengira kewarganegaraan pelaku. Semua kes perlu disiasat polis secara profesional.

input_text: Orang kampung cakap ada geng dari kaum tu merancang nak bakar surau malam ni. Share cepat supaya semua berjaga-jaga.
reason: Spreads unverified rumor about a planned arson attack on a mosque attributed to a specific ethnic group, capable of inciting panic and communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada ancaman keselamatan terhadap mana-mana rumah ibadat, hubungi polis segera di 999. Jangan sebarkan maklumat tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Budak sekolah Cina tu patut diajar adab sikit. Biadap sangat dengan cikgu Melayu. Memang darah diorang macam tu.
reason: Attributes rudeness to an entire ethnic group's bloodline, racially profiling schoolchildren and promoting ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Isu disiplin pelajar perlu ditangani oleh pihak sekolah secara adil, tanpa mengaitkan tingkah laku dengan latar belakang kaum.

input_text: Diorang punya tokong tu bising sangat la. Kalau boleh nak robohkan je semua. Ni Malaysia, bukan negara diorang.
reason: Threatens to demolish temples and denies a community's belonging in Malaysia, combining religious provocation with ethno-nationalist exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising dari rumah ibadat boleh diselesaikan melalui perbincangan dengan pihak berkuasa tempatan. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak beribadah.

input_text: Perempuan kaum tu memang senang je nak dapat. Diorang memang macam tu dari kecil. Jangan terkejut kalau anak korang pun terlibat.
reason: Sexually stereotypes women from a specific ethnic group, dehumanizing them with sexist and racist generalizations.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan buat generalisasi terhadap mana-mana kaum berdasarkan stereotaip. Setiap individu berhak dihormati tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Kalau betul dia pengkhianat agama, patut kena ajar. Seseorang kena bagi dia pelajaran biar dia sedar.
reason: Uses indirect revenge language suggesting someone should 'teach a lesson' to an alleged blasphemer, encouraging extrajudicial vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Isu menghina agama tertakluk di bawah undang-undang. Biarkan pihak berkuasa mengendalikan siasatan dan tindakan.

input_text: Aku dengar kawasan Taman Sri tu dah penuh dengan Bangla dan Rohingya. Diorang buat aktiviti haram malam-malam. Jangan bawak anak pergi situ.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about immigrant communities engaging in illegal activities in a specific area, fostering fear and prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aktiviti mencurigakan di kawasan kejiranan, laporkan kepada pihak polis. Jangan buat andaian berdasarkan kewarganegaraan penduduk.

input_text: Guru ugama tu sengaja ajar anak-anak benci kaum lain. Kita kena viralkan nama dia biar semua parent tahu.
reason: Calls for doxxing a religious teacher by name without verified evidence, encouraging public shaming and potential mob harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan mengenai pengajaran yang tidak sesuai, laporkan kepada Jabatan Pendidikan atau pihak sekolah secara rasmi.

input_text: Orang India memang suka mabuk. Tengok je kat kedai arak malam-malam, penuh dengan diorang. Lepas tu buat kecoh la, gaduh la.
reason: Applies negative drinking stereotypes to the entire Indian community, generalizing anti-social behavior based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Isu penyalahgunaan alkohol adalah masalah sosial yang merentasi semua kaum. Perlu ditangani melalui pendidikan dan sokongan, bukan stereotaip kaum.

input_text: Sekolah jenis kebangsaan tu memecahbelahkan negara. Tutup semua sekolah vernakular, biar semua masuk sekolah kebangsaan. Tak nak? Balik negara asal.
reason: Uses the vernacular school debate to delegitimize minority communities and tell them to leave the country, combining education policy with ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan mengenai sistem pendidikan perlu dilakukan secara inklusif dan menghormati hak semua rakyat Malaysia tanpa mengugut sesiapa.

input_text: Dah berapa kali aku cakap, jangan percaya bangsa tu. Diorang memang penipu dari lahir. Darah diorang memang macam tu.
reason: Dehumanizes an entire ethnic group by attributing dishonesty to their bloodline, promoting deep-seated racial prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan buat generalisasi terhadap sesuatu kaum. Setiap individu bertanggungjawab atas tindakan sendiri tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Warung tu guna minyak babi tau. Aku dapat tahu dari kawan. Share kat semua Muslim supaya boikot.
reason: Spreads unverified halal compliance claims about a food establishment, potentially damaging a business through religious fear-mongering.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada keraguan tentang status halal sesebuah premis, semak dengan JAKIM atau buat aduan rasmi. Jangan sebarkan maklumat tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Politician kaum tu memang tak boleh dipercayai. Diorang masuk politik pun untuk kepentingan bangsa sendiri je. Pengkhianat negara.
reason: Brands all politicians of a certain ethnicity as traitors serving only their own race, promoting ethnic-based political distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Kita boleh mengkritik dasar politik tanpa menyalahkan seluruh kaum. Setiap wakil rakyat perlu dinilai berdasarkan prestasi, bukan bangsa.

input_text: Kawasan flat PPR tu dah jadi sarang penjenayah sebab terlalu ramai PATI. Orang tempatan takut nak keluar malam. Kena bersihkan kawasan tu.
reason: Blames crime in public housing on immigrant populations and uses dehumanizing 'cleansing' language, fostering xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keselamatan di kawasan perumahan awam perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa melalui rondaan dan penguatkuasaan undang-undang yang lebih baik.

input_text: Cikgu tu ajar kat sekolah kata semua bukan Islam masuk neraka. Anak aku balik rumah takut main dengan kawan Cina dia. Ni betul ke ajaran macam ni?
reason: Reports divisive religious teaching that alienates children from other faiths, highlighting religious provocation in educational settings.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada pengajaran agama yang menyebabkan ketakutan terhadap kaum lain, bincang dengan pihak sekolah dan Jabatan Agama untuk penyelesaian yang menghormati semua.

input_text: Pakcik tu dah tua-tua pun nak kahwin budak 14 tahun. Memang la orang kampung, jahil. Patut kena sebat depan orang ramai baru sedar.
reason: While raising a legitimate child marriage concern, advocates public corporal punishment and demeans rural communities as ignorant.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan kanak-kanak bawah umur perlu ditangani melalui undang-undang yang lebih ketat dan pendidikan masyarakat, bukan keganasan.

input_text: Doktor kat klinik kerajaan tu semua malas. Terutama yang dari kaum tu, memang suka ponteng kerja. Pesakit mati pun diorang tak kisah.
reason: Racially targets healthcare workers from a specific ethnic group as lazy and indifferent to patient deaths, combining professional slander with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan terhadap kualiti perkhidmatan kesihatan, laporkan kepada Kementerian Kesihatan tanpa mengaitkan isu tersebut dengan kaum petugas.

input_text: Viral je video tu. Biar semua orang kenal siapa kakak tu yang jual arak haram kat budak sekolah. Nama dia Siti dari Taman Desa.
reason: Shares partial personal information including name and area of residence to encourage public vigilante shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kes penjualan arak secara haram kepada kanak-kanak, laporkan kepada polis. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi di media sosial.

input_text: Pekerja kilang dari Myanmar tu curi elektrik dan air kat flat. Memang la semua foreign worker macam ni, tak bermoral langsung.
reason: Generalizes all foreign workers as immoral thieves based on the actions of a few, promoting xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kecurian utiliti perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak pengurusan dan polis tanpa membuat generalisasi terhadap semua pekerja asing.

input_text: Diorang nak bina kuil baru kat kawasan Melayu. Dah la bising, lepas tu diorang punya perayaan terlalu banyak. Kena tolak habis-habisan.
reason: Objects to temple construction purely on ethnic-territorial grounds and dismisses religious festivities as nuisance, provoking inter-religious tension.
suggested_rewrite: Pembinaan rumah ibadat tertakluk kepada proses kelulusan PBT. Perbincangan perlu dilakukan secara aman dan menghormati hak beribadah semua pihak.

input_text: Aku tau siapa yang bagi maklumat kat SPRM pasal projek tu. Kena ajar dia sikit biar dia faham harga pengkhianatan.
reason: Uses indirect threat language against a whistleblower, suggesting retribution for reporting corruption, which endangers civic participation.
suggested_rewrite: Pemberi maklumat dilindungi di bawah undang-undang. Mereka memainkan peranan penting dalam membanteras rasuah dan perlu dihormati.

input_text: These people from that community are always the ones causing trouble. Every crime in KL, check la who commits it. Ban them from our neighborhoods.
reason: Falsely attributes urban crime to a specific community and calls for residential segregation, promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a complex issue that affects all communities. We should support evidence-based policing rather than targeting any specific group.

input_text: Don't hire Malays la. They always MC and take long lunch breaks. If you want efficiency, stick to your own kind only.
reason: Promotes workplace discrimination by stereotyping Malay employees as lazy and advocating ethnically exclusive hiring practices.
suggested_rewrite: Employee performance should be evaluated individually regardless of ethnicity. Workplace policies should ensure fairness for all staff.

input_text: This Indian reporter keeps writing anti-government articles. Someone should hack her social media and expose all her private messages. She needs to be silenced.
reason: Targets a journalist for her reporting with threats to hack and expose private information, combining press harassment with privacy violation calls.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreeing with a journalist's views is your right, but threatening to hack accounts or silence them undermines press freedom. Respond through proper feedback channels.

input_text: Fake news is saying the Orang Asli communities are protesting peacefully. Don't believe them — they are being funded by foreign NGOs to destabilize the country.
reason: Delegitimizes indigenous rights protests with unverified foreign interference conspiracy theories, undermining marginalized communities.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities have legitimate concerns about their land and rights. Their protests should be understood in context rather than dismissed with unverified conspiracy claims.

input_text: Just saw a group of Rohingya men near the playground. Lock your doors, hide your kids. You know what they are capable of.
reason: Spreads fear about Rohingya refugees being dangerous to children based purely on their presence, promoting xenophobic panic.
suggested_rewrite: If you have genuine safety concerns about any individuals in your neighborhood, contact the authorities. Do not spread fear based on someone's ethnicity or refugee status.

input_text: All Chinese schools are brainwashing centers. They teach kids to be loyal to China, not Malaysia. Close them all down.
reason: Falsely claims Chinese schools promote foreign loyalty, using conspiracy-like framing to justify closure of minority educational institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy discussions should be evidence-based. Chinese schools in Malaysia follow the national curriculum and contribute to the country's multilingual heritage.

input_text: That Malay girl wearing short skirt at the mall — where are her parents? This is what happens when Muslims don't follow their religion properly.
reason: Publicly shames a young woman based on clothing and uses it to make provocative statements about Muslim religious observance.
suggested_rewrite: Personal clothing choices are an individual matter. It's inappropriate to publicly judge or shame anyone based on their appearance.

input_text: The Mamak restaurants are all dirty. Indians don't know hygiene. I would rather starve than eat at one of their shops.
reason: Stereotypes all Indian-run restaurants as unhygienic and attributes it to ethnic characteristics, promoting racial discrimination against food businesses.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene standards should be enforced consistently across all restaurants. If you have concerns about a specific establishment, report it to the health authorities.

input_text: Forwarding this because everyone needs to know: a group of Bangladeshis are kidnapping kids in Selangor for organ trafficking. My friend's cousin saw it.
reason: Spreads a classic viral child kidnapping hoax attributed to a specific nationality, using unverified anecdotal evidence to incite panic.
suggested_rewrite: Child kidnapping rumors should be verified with police before sharing. PDRM has repeatedly debunked such viral hoaxes. Spreading unverified claims can endanger innocent people.

input_text: Muslim women who wear niqab are extremists. The government should ban the niqab like France did. These women are a security threat.
reason: Labels niqab-wearing women as extremists and security threats, stigmatizing Muslim women's religious expression.
suggested_rewrite: Discussions about religious attire should respect individual freedom of expression. Security concerns should be addressed through proper policies, not by targeting specific religious practices.

input_text: I know where that activist lives. He stays in Bangsar area near the LRT station. Someone from our group should pay him a visit and teach him to keep quiet.
reason: Shares approximate location of an activist and suggests intimidation through a group visit, combining privacy exposure with veiled vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreeing with activists is your right, but sharing their location and suggesting intimidation is dangerous and potentially illegal. Engage through proper dialogue channels.

input_text: These Christians are trying to convert our Muslim youth through their charity programs. Wake up people, it's a hidden agenda!
reason: Frames charitable work as a covert proselytization scheme, inciting suspicion and hostility toward Christian organizations.
suggested_rewrite: Proselytization concerns can be raised through official religious channels. Many charity programs serve communities regardless of faith and should not be automatically suspected.

input_text: Have you noticed how many Chinese own property here but don't even speak BM? They take our resources but refuse to integrate. Parasites.
reason: Calls Chinese Malaysians 'parasites' for perceived lack of integration, using dehumanizing language and ethnic scapegoating.
suggested_rewrite: National unity benefits from encouraging multilingualism including BM proficiency. We should promote integration through positive policies, not by dehumanizing any community.

input_text: Malay privilege is a joke. They get everything on a silver platter — scholarships, contracts, housing discounts — and still can't compete. What does that tell you?
reason: Mocks Malay affirmative action policies in a way that implies racial inferiority, provocatively suggesting Malays cannot succeed despite advantages.
suggested_rewrite: Affirmative action policies can be discussed constructively by evaluating their effectiveness and suggesting reforms, without implying any group is inherently less capable.

input_text: Don't trust any Tamil news sources. They always exaggerate and play victim. It's all propaganda to get sympathy and government handouts.
reason: Dismisses all Tamil-language media as propaganda and accuses the community of playing victim, undermining minority representation.
suggested_rewrite: All media sources should be evaluated on their reporting quality, not the language they publish in. Tamil media serves an important role in Malaysia's multilingual society.

input_text: These illegal immigrants are breeding like rabbits and soon they'll outnumber us. The government is too weak to do anything about this invasion.
reason: Uses dehumanizing reproductive language about immigrants and frames migration as an 'invasion', spreading xenophobic conspiracy narratives.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy is a legitimate concern that should be addressed through proper governance and enforcement, without dehumanizing language about any group.

input_text: That blogger who criticized the Sultan should be doxxed. Post his IC number, address, everything. Let the rakyat deal with him.
reason: Calls for full doxxing of a person for political speech and invites mob justice, combining serious privacy violations with vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Criticism of public institutions is covered under free speech laws. If speech crosses legal boundaries, report it to authorities rather than exposing someone's personal data.

input_text: The Sikh community thinks they're above the law. Their temples block roads during processions and nobody dares complain. Time to put them in their place.
reason: Targets the Sikh community with threatening language about 'putting them in their place' over religious processions, combining religious hostility with communal threats.
suggested_rewrite: Traffic management during religious processions can be discussed with local authorities. All communities have the right to celebrate their traditions with proper coordination.

input_text: B40 Malays are poor because they're lazy, full stop. Stop blaming the system — it's their own fault for not working hard enough.
reason: Attributes poverty of a specific ethnic group to laziness, dismissing systemic inequalities and promoting a racist poverty narrative.
suggested_rewrite: Poverty is a multifaceted issue involving systemic factors like access to education and opportunities. Solutions should focus on addressing structural barriers, not blaming individuals.

input_text: Chinese Malaysians control all the banks and corporations. They're the real puppet masters of this country. Wake up Malays, you're being played.
reason: Promotes an ethnic conspiracy theory about Chinese economic domination, using 'puppet master' rhetoric to inflame racial tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Economic participation in Malaysia involves all communities. Concerns about corporate concentration should focus on policy solutions, not ethnic scapegoating.

input_text: Shared this screenshot of that teacher's WhatsApp. She told her students Christianity is the only true religion. Everyone in Shah Alam needs to know who she is.
reason: Shares private messages to expose and publicly shame a teacher over alleged religious statements, risking mob targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about religious proselytization in schools should be reported to the school administration and education department, not shared publicly with personal identifiers.

input_text: Indians always play the race card when they don't get what they want. Stop crying discrimination — you people just aren't qualified enough.
reason: Dismisses racial discrimination concerns of the Indian community as fabricated while implying they lack qualifications, combining gaslighting with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Discrimination claims should be evaluated on their merits. Dismissing entire communities' experiences prevents genuine dialogue about equality and inclusion.

input_text: My neighbor just told me a Myanmar gang is planning to rob houses in Section 7 this weekend. Forward this to all residents. Don't let these foreigners terrorize us.
reason: Spreads unverified crime warnings attributed to a specific nationality, inciting fear and potentially triggering vigilante responses against innocent people.
suggested_rewrite: If you receive information about potential criminal activity, report it directly to the nearest police station. Sharing unverified warnings on social media can cause panic and harm innocent people.

input_text: Semua orang Melayu yang sokong DAP tu pengkhianat bangsa. Diorang dah jual agama dan bangsa sendiri untuk kuasa.
reason: Labels Malays who support a multiracial party as racial and religious traitors, using toxic polarisation to suppress political diversity.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap rakyat berhak menyokong parti politik pilihan mereka. Perbezaan pendapat politik tidak bermakna pengkhianatan terhadap bangsa atau agama.

input_text: Warga emas India kena tipu dengan sindiket penipuan Cina. Memang la kaum tu suka tipu orang tua. Jangan percaya mana-mana Cina.
reason: Uses a fraud case to generalize all Chinese people as scammers targeting the elderly, promoting blanket ethnic distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Sindiket penipuan perlu dibanteras oleh polis tanpa mengira kaum pelaku. Warga emas semua kaum perlu diberi kesedaran tentang penipuan.

input_text: 这些马来人就是懒，拿了政府补贴还不努力工作。难怪国家发展不起来。
reason: Labels all Malays as lazy and dependent on government subsidies, attributing national underdevelopment to their ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: 国家发展需要各族共同努力。政府援助政策应该根据需求评估，不应以种族来概括个人的努力程度。

input_text: 听说那个马来小区的人计划来我们这里搞事。大家晚上要小心，锁好门窗。
reason: Spreads unverified rumor that a Malay community is planning to cause trouble, inciting fear and inter-ethnic suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有安全方面的担忧，应直接联系警方核实。不要传播未经证实的消息，以免引起不必要的恐慌。

input_text: 那些印度庙每天早上那么吵，敲锣打鼓的。真应该把这些庙都拆了，搬到偏远的地方去。
reason: Calls for demolishing Indian temples and relocating them due to noise complaints, disrespecting religious freedom and community rights.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对宗教场所的噪音有意见，可以通过地方政府进行协调。所有宗教场所都受法律保护，应该尊重各族的宗教权利。

input_text: 马来西亚的经济都被马来人搞垮了。他们只会搞政治，不会做生意。华人才是真正在推动经济的人。
reason: Claims Malays ruined the economy while only Chinese contribute, creating a divisive hierarchy of ethnic economic worth.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的经济发展是各族共同努力的结果。经济议题应从政策角度讨论，而不是归咎于某个族群。

input_text: 不要去那家马来人开的店，他们背后肯定在食物里做手脚。这种事已经发生过很多次了。
reason: Spreads unverified food tampering accusations against Malay-owned businesses, promoting ethnic distrust through misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 食品安全问题应向卫生部门举报。不应因店主的种族背景而做出无根据的指控。

input_text: 转发这个：有一群外劳在吉隆坡专门拐骗华人小孩。我朋友的邻居亲眼看到的，大家一定要小心！
reason: Spreads viral child kidnapping hoax targeting foreign workers, using secondhand anecdotes to create xenophobic panic.
suggested_rewrite: 这类消息未经警方证实。如有真实安全隐忧，请报警处理。散播未经证实的谣言可能导致无辜者受害。

input_text: 华人要团结起来，不要买马来人的东西。只支持自己人的生意，这样才能保护我们的经济利益。
reason: Explicitly calls for ethnic-based economic boycott against Malay businesses, promoting racial economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: 支持本地中小企业是好事，但不应以种族为基准。跨族群的经济合作对国家发展更有利。

input_text: 那个马来女记者一直写反华文章，应该把她的个人资料发出来，让大家知道她住在哪里。
reason: Calls for doxxing a journalist perceived as anti-Chinese, threatening press freedom and personal safety.
suggested_rewrite: 对新闻报道有不同意见，可以通过正式渠道提出反馈。泄露记者个人信息可能危及其安全，也违反法律。

input_text: 印度人管理的公司一定很乱。他们连自己的社区都管不好，怎么可能管好公司？
reason: Stereotypes Indians as poor managers and extends community stereotypes to professional capability, promoting workplace discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: 公司管理能力取决于个人的专业素养和经验，与种族无关。不应以族群背景来判断管理能力。

input_text: 穆斯林斋月期间不让我们在他们面前吃东西，这太霸道了。他们的宗教不应该影响我们的自由。
reason: Misrepresents Ramadan cultural sensitivity as religious oppression, provoking inter-religious tensions through distorted framing.
suggested_rewrite: 斋月期间的相互尊重是马来西亚多元文化的传统。虽然没有法律强制，但在公共场合适当体谅有助于社会和谐。

input_text: 我听说政府要把更多马来人安置到华人区来，这是要稀释我们的人口。大家要抵制！
reason: Spreads conspiracy theory about government demographic manipulation to 'dilute' Chinese population, inciting ethnic panic and resistance.
suggested_rewrite: 住房政策应该为所有公民提供公平的居住机会。散布未经证实的人口阴谋论只会加剧族群间的不信任。

input_text: 那些原住民就是不思进取。政府给了那么多援助还是穷。他们的文化就是落后的。
reason: Dismisses indigenous (Orang Asli) communities as culturally backward and ungrateful for aid, promoting ethnic supremacy narratives.
suggested_rewrite: 原住民社区面临独特的结构性挑战，包括土地权益和基础设施不足。应该理解这些背景因素，而不是贬低其文化。

input_text: 这些外劳偷了我们的工作，还犯罪。应该把他们全部赶走，一个都不留。
reason: Scapegoats all foreign workers for unemployment and crime, calling for mass deportation with dehumanizing language.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳政策需要平衡经济需求和社会影响。应通过合法渠道管理劳工问题，不应将所有外劳视为犯罪分子。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் கட்சிக்காரங்க எல்லாரும் ஊழல்வாதிகள். அவங்களுக்கு நாட்டு நலன் பத்தி எதுவும் தெரியாது.
reason: Labels all Malay politicians as corrupt and uncaring about the nation, promoting ethnic-based political hostility.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் எல்லா கட்சிகளிலும் இருக்கலாம். அரசியல்வாதிகளை அவர்கள் செயல்பாடுகளின் அடிப்படையில் மதிப்பிட வேண்டும், இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் அல்ல.

input_text: சீனக்காரங்க கடையில வாங்காதீங்க. அவங்க நம்ம தமிழ் மக்களை ஏமாத்துறாங்க. நம்ம ஆளுங்க கடையில மட்டும் வாங்குங்க.
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott of Chinese businesses based on fraud allegations, promoting economic segregation along racial lines.
suggested_rewrite: உள்ளூர் வணிகங்களை ஆதரிப்பது நல்லது, ஆனால் கடை உரிமையாளரின் இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் பாகுபாடு காட்டக்கூடாது.

input_text: இஸ்லாமிய பள்ளிகளில் நம்ம குழந்தைகளை மதமாற்றம் செய்ய பார்க்குறாங்க. எச்சரிக்கையா இருங்க, இது திட்டமிட்ட சதி.
reason: Spreads unverified conspiracy theory about planned religious conversion of Tamil children in Islamic schools, inciting inter-religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: மதமாற்றம் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால், கல்வி அமைச்சகம் அல்லது மத அதிகாரிகளிடம் முறையாக புகார் அளிக்கவும்.

input_text: அந்த மலாய் பையன் நம்ம பொண்ணை தொந்தரவு பண்றான். யாராவது போய் அவனுக்கு ஒரு பாடம் கற்பிக்கணும்.
reason: Uses indirect revenge language suggesting someone should 'teach a lesson' to a person identified by ethnicity, promoting vigilantism with racial overtones.
suggested_rewrite: தொல்லை கொடுக்கும் நடத்தை குறித்து காவல்துறையில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சட்டத்தை கையில் எடுக்காதீர்கள்.

input_text: இந்த வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்கள் எல்லாரும் திருடர்கள். நம்ம பகுதியில இருந்து விரட்ட வேண்டும்.
reason: Labels all foreign workers as thieves and calls for driving them out of the neighborhood, promoting xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: குற்ற சம்பவங்கள் குறித்த புகார்களை காவல்துறையிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். அனைத்து வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்களையும் குற்றவாளிகளாக கருதுவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: அந்த ஆக்டிவிஸ்ட் பெண்ணோட போன் நம்பர் இதுதான். அவ வீட்டு முகவரியும் இருக்கு. எல்லாரும் ஷேர் பண்ணுங்க.
reason: Shares personal contact information and home address of a female activist, exposing her to harassment and potential physical danger.
suggested_rewrite: ஆக்டிவிஸ்ட்களின் தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதமானது. கருத்து வேறுபாடுகளை முறையான வழிகளில் தெரிவிக்கவும்.

input_text: மலாய் பெண்கள் ஹிஜாப் போடுறது மத அடிமைத்தனம். இந்த 21ம் நூற்றாண்டில் இப்படி இருக்கிறது வெட்கக்கேடு.
reason: Attacks hijab-wearing as religious slavery and calls it shameful, disrespecting Muslim women's religious expression.
suggested_rewrite: ஹிஜாப் அணிவது ஒரு தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் மத உரிமை. மற்றவர்களின் மத நடைமுறைகளை இழிவுபடுத்துவது சரியல்ல.

input_text: நம்ம இந்து கோவில்களை இடிக்கிறாங்க ஆனா மசூதிகளை யாரும் தொடமாட்டாங்க. இது என்ன நியாயம்? இந்த அரசாங்கம் நம்மை ஒடுக்குகிறது.
reason: Uses temple demolition grievances to create a divisive religious persecution narrative, claiming systematic oppression against Hindus.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களுக்கும் சட்ட பாதுகாப்பு வேண்டும். சொத்து நிலம் தொடர்பான பிரச்சினைகளை சட்ட வழியில் தீர்க்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: அவங்க சமூகத்தில் இருந்து யாரையும் நம்ப வேண்டாம். ரத்தத்திலேயே பொய் சொல்றது இருக்கு அவங்களுக்கு.
reason: Attributes dishonesty to the blood/genetics of an entire community, promoting dehumanizing racial essentialism.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு நபரும் அவர்களின் சொந்த நடத்தையின் அடிப்படையில் மதிப்பிடப்பட வேண்டும். முழு சமூகத்தையும் ஒரே மாதிரியாக சித்தரிப்பது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: Bro these Bangla workers so dirty la, they share one room 20 people. No wonder got disease spreading in our taman. Kena report semua diorang.
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi workers as dirty disease carriers, using their living conditions (often imposed by exploitative employers) to justify mass reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Overcrowded worker housing is an employer compliance issue. Report housing violations to the Labour Department rather than blaming the workers themselves.

input_text: Eh korang dengar tak, that Chinese towkay exploit his Malay workers gila babi. Memang la orang Cina, always take advantage of kita orang.
reason: Uses a single employer's alleged exploitation to generalize all Chinese people as taking advantage of Malays, promoting ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Worker exploitation should be reported to the Labour Department regardless of the employer's ethnicity. It's unfair to generalize the behavior of one person to an entire community.

input_text: Apasal la these Malay officers asyik kacau Indian traders je? Racist gila babi diorang ni. Memang la kalau Melayu pegang kuasa, semua orang lain kena buli.
reason: Generalizes that Malays in authority bully all other races, using a specific enforcement incident to fuel broad ethnic hostility against Malay governance.
suggested_rewrite: If enforcement actions appear discriminatory, file a complaint with the relevant oversight body. Individual misconduct should not be attributed to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: This ustaz cakap kat ceramah that non-Muslims are enemies of Islam. Then you wonder why racial tension so high. Share this video biar semua orang tahu.
reason: Reports and amplifies a divisive religious sermon labeling non-Muslims as enemies, contributing to viral spread of inter-religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Divisive religious sermons should be reported to JAKIM or relevant religious authorities. Viral sharing may amplify the harmful message instead of addressing it.

input_text: My friend kena harass by a group of Rohingya guys kat LRT station. Confirm la these refugees semua macam tu. Kena halau balik semua.
reason: Uses an alleged individual incident to condemn all Rohingya refugees as harassers and call for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Harassment is a serious issue — report it to the police. But one incident should not be used to condemn an entire refugee community.

input_text: Weh that Cina punya anak buli my cousin kat school sebab dia pakai tudung. These people memang tak respect our religion la. Kena teach them a lesson.
reason: Generalizes from a schoolyard bullying incident to condemn an entire ethnicity and uses veiled threat language about teaching them a lesson.
suggested_rewrite: Bullying based on religious attire is wrong and should be addressed through the school's disciplinary process. Don't escalate the situation or blame an entire community.

input_text: LOL those Indian temples kat Batu Caves so ugly can see from highway. Government should demolish and buat highway extension je, more useful for everyone.
reason: Mocks Hindu temples at a major religious site and suggests demolishing them for infrastructure, disrespecting a significant religious heritage site.
suggested_rewrite: Batu Caves is a nationally significant religious and cultural heritage site. Infrastructure planning should respect and preserve such important landmarks.

input_text: Ini viral kat group: ada satu gang from that kampung planning nak masuk our taman and curi motor this weekend. Semua jiran kena standby, we handle this ourselves.
reason: Spreads unverified crime rumor attributed to a specific village and calls for vigilante response instead of police action.
suggested_rewrite: If you receive information about potential crime, report it to the police immediately. Do not attempt to handle security matters on your own as it could lead to dangerous confrontations.

input_text: That DAP supporter punya wife kerja kat hospital tu. Ada orang share her IC number and phone. Good, let people know who these traitors' families are.
reason: Celebrates the leaking of a political opponent's spouse's personal data, extending political targeting to innocent family members.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing personal information of politicians' family members is a serious privacy violation. Family members should not be targeted for someone's political views.

input_text: Nampak tak kat TikTok orang Melayu viral gelak bodoh pasal Hindu prayer rituals. Diorang memang tak respect other religions punya practices one la.
reason: While calling out mockery, generalizes all Malays as disrespecting Hindu practices, escalating the situation into communal blame rather than addressing individual behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Mocking any religion's practices is wrong. If you encounter such content, report it to the platform. Don't generalize the behavior of a few to an entire community.

input_text: Diorang punya kuil tu illegal one la, no permit. Yet government buat tak tahu je. If it was a surau, confirm kena demolish already. Double standard gila.
reason: Uses the permit issue to create a religious persecution narrative with unverified double-standard claims, inflaming inter-religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: All places of worship should comply with local regulations. If there are genuine permit issues, they should be resolved through legal channels rather than through inflammatory comparisons.

input_text: That Melayu influencer cakap Christians semua nak convert orang Islam. Her followers now harassing Christian schools kat area dia. Someone should share her home address biar dia rasa.
reason: Responds to religious provocation by calling for doxxing the influencer's home address, creating a cycle of harassment and privacy violations.
suggested_rewrite: Report inflammatory content about religious conversion to MCMC. Sharing someone's personal address as retaliation is dangerous and illegal, regardless of what they said.

input_text: Kan aku dah cakap, orang kampung tu memang tak boleh dipercayai. Semua penipu. Don't do business with them unless you want to kena tipu.
reason: Labels an entire village community as untrustworthy fraudsters, promoting social exclusion and economic boycott based on geographic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Business dealings should be evaluated on individual trustworthiness, not based on where someone comes from. Due diligence applies to all transactions.

input_text: Semua masalah dadah kat Malaysia ni sebab orang India la. Tengok statistics, majority drug addicts are from that community. Fact cannot deny.
reason: Misrepresents drug addiction statistics to blame the Indian community, spreading misleading claims as facts to justify ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Drug addiction affects all communities in Malaysia. Effective solutions require comprehensive policy approaches rather than blaming any single ethnic group.

input_text: Banyak sangat la Indon masuk sini. Diorang buat kerja murah sampai local contractor semua bankrupt. Government should prioritize anak tempatan, bukan bagi chance kat pendatang haram ni.
reason: Blames Indonesian workers for local business failures and frames immigration as invasion, promoting xenophobic economic nationalism.
suggested_rewrite: Isu persaingan tenaga kerja perlu ditangani melalui dasar gaji minimum dan penguatkuasaan undang-undang buruh, tanpa menyalahkan pekerja asing secara keseluruhan.

input_text: Aku share nama dan gambar budak yang buli anak aku kat sekolah. Ni dia dan family dia. Biar semua orang tahu macam mana diorang didik anak.
reason: Shares personal information and images of a minor and their family for public shaming over a school bullying incident.
suggested_rewrite: Isu buli sekolah perlu ditangani melalui pihak sekolah dan kaunselor. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi kanak-kanak di media sosial boleh membahayakan keselamatan mereka.

input_text: Jangan kahwin dengan orang kaum tu. Nanti anak-anak jadi keliru, tak tahu bangsa sendiri. Keluarga pun malu.
reason: Discourages interethnic marriage by claiming it causes identity confusion and family shame, promoting racial purity ideology.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah hak peribadi setiap individu. Keluarga pelbagai kaum memperkayakan budaya Malaysia dan tidak sepatutnya dipandang hina.

input_text: Ada source cakap kerajaan nak ambil tanah rizab Melayu bagi kat developer Cina. Bangkit la orang Melayu, jangan biarkan hak kita dirampas.
reason: Spreads unverified conspiracy about Malay reserve land being given to Chinese developers, inciting ethnic mobilization based on misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah rizab Melayu tertakluk di bawah Perlembagaan. Jika ada kebimbangan, semak fakta dengan Pejabat Tanah dan buat aduan rasmi, jangan sebarkan maklumat tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak tu tak patut dapat hak sama macam kita. Diorang baru join Malaysia, nak demand macam-macam pulak.
reason: Denies equal rights to East Malaysians and dismisses their constitutional claims, promoting divisive West-East Malaysia hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah dan Sarawak mempunyai hak yang dijamin di bawah Perjanjian Malaysia 1963. Perbincangan mengenai hak mereka perlu berlandaskan fakta sejarah dan perundangan.

input_text: Ustazah kat sekolah anak aku ajar yang Yahudi dan Nasrani musuh Islam. Bagus, biar anak-anak tahu siapa musuh sebenar.
reason: Endorses teaching children that Jews and Christians are enemies of Islam, promoting inter-religious hostility in educational settings.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan agama perlu mengajar nilai-nilai keamanan dan toleransi. Menamakan penganut agama lain sebagai musuh boleh menimbulkan kebencian dalam kalangan kanak-kanak.

input_text: Memang betul la, orang asli tu malas sangat. Dah berapa projek kerajaan bagi, tapi masih hidup macam tu. Bazir duit rakyat je.
reason: Labels Orang Asli communities as lazy and wasteful of government resources, dismissing systemic barriers they face.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Orang Asli menghadapi cabaran sistemik termasuk akses kepada pendidikan dan infrastruktur. Projek pembangunan perlu direka bersama komuniti untuk keberkesanan.

input_text: Those Myanmar people semua illegal one. Hari tu nampak satu group kat pasar, confirm doing something shady. Kita kena ambil tindakan sendiri sebab police tak buat kerja.
reason: Labels all Myanmar nationals as illegal and suspicious based on appearance, then advocates vigilante action due to perceived police inaction.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect illegal activity, report it to the police. Taking matters into your own hands is dangerous and could target innocent people.

input_text: Perasan tak how these Chinese companies always hire their own kind? Racism betul la. They only care about their bangsa, tak pernah bagi chance kat orang lain.
reason: Accuses all Chinese-owned companies of ethnic-based hiring discrimination, generalizing hiring practices across an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe you've faced hiring discrimination, report it to the Labour Department. Employment practices should be evaluated at the company level, not attributed to an entire ethnic group.

input_text: Neighbor baru pindah tu from Indonesia. Confirm la dia bawa penyakit. Diorang punya hygiene standard memang low. Jangan bagi anak main dengan anak dia.
reason: Stigmatizes an Indonesian neighbor as a disease carrier and advises social isolation of their children, promoting xenophobic discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan buat andaian tentang kesihatan jiran berdasarkan negara asal mereka. Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity. Welcome new neighbors and build community together.

input_text: Korang share la post ni sampai viral. Budak Melayu kena pukul kat sekolah Cina. Ini bukti diorang benci kita. Time to pull our kids out from Chinese schools.
reason: Uses an unverified school incident to frame Chinese schools as hostile to Malays and call for mass withdrawal, inflaming ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: School violence incidents should be investigated by the school administration and education department. Don't use unverified incidents to generalize about any school system.

input_text: Hari tu pergi Penang, semua signboard Cina je. Where is the Bahasa Melayu? Ni Malaysia ke China? Diorang langsung tak hormat bahasa kebangsaan. Memang nak kena.
reason: Uses signage language policy concerns to question the national loyalty of Chinese Malaysians and implies they deserve punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Signage regulations require Bahasa Malaysia alongside other languages. If there are compliance issues, raise them with DBKL or relevant local authorities rather than making ethnic generalizations.

input_text: These orang asli claim the land is theirs but they do nothing with it. Just let proper developers take over la. At least the land will be productive.
reason: Dismisses indigenous land rights and frames Orang Asli as unproductive, advocating for their displacement by developers.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli have constitutionally protected customary land rights. Development should involve free, prior, and informed consent from indigenous communities.

input_text: Just found out that halal cert for that restaurant was fake. See, these non-Muslim businesses always trying to cheat Muslim consumers. Boycott all non-Muslim food businesses!
reason: Uses an alleged single halal fraud case to call for blanket boycott of all non-Muslim food businesses, spreading religious-based economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Halal certification fraud is a serious matter — report it to JAKIM. But one case should not be used to condemn all non-Muslim food businesses.

input_text: 我们这边有几个印度人总是晚上喝酒闹事。所有印度人都这样，没有教养。以后不要把房子租给他们。
reason: Uses incidents of a few individuals to call for housing discrimination against all Indians, promoting racial profiling in rental practices.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有邻居制造噪音或闹事，应向管理层或警方投诉。不应因少数人的行为而歧视整个族群的租房权利。

input_text: Kenapa la banyak sangat cuti agama diorang? Cuti Deepavali, Thaipusam, Chinese New Year. Kalau ikut agama rasmi negara, cuti Islam je yang patut ada.
reason: Advocates removing non-Muslim public holidays, denying the multicultural character of Malaysia and marginalizing minority religious celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: Cuti umum pelbagai agama mencerminkan kepelbagaian budaya Malaysia. Ia memupuk persefahaman antara kaum dan merupakan kekuatan negara kita.

input_text: Ada informasi kat WhatsApp group: orang Bangladesh merancang serang surau kat Ampang malam ni. Tolong share cepat, semua orang kena standby.
reason: Spreads a highly dangerous unverified WhatsApp rumor about planned mosque attacks by Bangladeshi nationals, capable of triggering communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan mesej ancaman yang tidak disahkan. Jika anda menerima maklumat sebegini, hubungi polis segera di 999 untuk pengesahan.

input_text: Dia punya IC nombor 85XXXX-XX-XXXX, rumah dia kat Taman Melati blok C. Forward kat semua group supaya orang boleh pergi confront dia sendiri.
reason: Shares partial IC number and home address to enable others to confront someone in person, creating serious personal safety risks.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang adalah pelanggaran privasi yang serius. Jika ada aduan, gunakan saluran rasmi seperti polis atau SKMM.

input_text: That NGO run by Indians is just a front for money laundering. All their charity work is fake. Don't donate anything to them.
reason: Makes unverified money laundering accusations against an NGO identified by ethnicity, undermining charitable work through racial profiling.
suggested_rewrite: If you have evidence of financial misconduct by any NGO, report it to the Registrar of Societies or MACC. Don't make accusations based on the ethnicity of the organization's leaders.

input_text: Apahal la Melayu asyik komplen pasal hak bumiputera? Dah la banyak dapat advantage still nak complain. Memang betul la stereotype yang cakap diorang entitled.
reason: Validates and reinforces negative stereotypes about Malays being entitled, dismissing constitutional rights discussions as whining.
suggested_rewrite: Bumiputera rights are part of the constitutional framework and can be discussed constructively. Dismissing an entire community's concerns with stereotypes is unhelpful.

input_text: Muslim students kena pray 5 times a day in school, waste so much time. No wonder la their academic results always behind Chinese students.
reason: Mocks Muslim prayer obligations and uses them to explain academic performance gaps between ethnicities, combining religious disrespect with ethnic superiority claims.
suggested_rewrite: Academic performance is influenced by many factors including resources and teaching quality. It's disrespectful to attribute educational outcomes to religious practices.

input_text: Eh jangan la support kedai mamak tu. Owner dia sponsor ceramah anti-Melayu. Kena boikot habis sampai dia tutup.
reason: Spreads unverified claim about a business owner sponsoring anti-Malay speeches to justify an ethnic boycott campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti aktiviti yang menyalahi undang-undang, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Jangan boikot perniagaan berdasarkan maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: 印度社区的人总是拖慢政府项目进度，动不动就抗议。应该取消他们的抗议权利。
reason: Blames the Indian community for delaying government projects through protests and advocates stripping their constitutional right to peaceful assembly.
suggested_rewrite: 和平抗议是宪法保障的权利。政府项目应通过适当的公众咨询程序进行，以解决受影响社区的合理关切。

input_text: Kalau nampak foreigners suspicious kat taman, ambil gambar dan share kat group. Jangan tunggu polis, diorang tak buat apa pun. Kita jaga sendiri kawasan kita.
reason: Encourages photographing and sharing images of 'suspicious foreigners' while advocating community vigilantism over police involvement.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kawasan kejiranan penting, tetapi mengambil gambar orang tanpa izin dan menggantikan peranan polis boleh membahayakan orang yang tidak bersalah. Hubungi polis jika ada kecurigaan.

input_text: Mak budak tu post kat Facebook anak dia kena gangster India kat sekolah. Dah jadi macam ni la kalau biarkan kaum tu masuk sekolah kebangsaan.
reason: Uses an alleged school bullying incident to argue against Indian children attending national schools, promoting educational segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu keganasan di sekolah perlu ditangani melalui tindakan disiplin dan kaunseling, tanpa mengaitkannya dengan kaum pelajar atau menafikan hak pendidikan sesiapa.

input_text: Budak tu pakai baju seksi pergi kenduri. Padan muka kena kacau. Kalau pakai tutup aurat, takde la jadi macam tu.
reason: Victim-blames a harassment target based on clothing and uses religious dress codes to justify the harassment, normalizing abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Tiada siapa yang patut diganggu tanpa mengira pakaian mereka. Gangguan seksual adalah salah dan pelaku yang bertanggungjawab, bukan mangsa.

input_text: The Kadazan people want more autonomy? Go ahead, leave Malaysia then. We don't need Sabah anyway. Let them fend for themselves without our federal money.
reason: Dismisses Kadazan autonomy aspirations with hostility and threatens economic abandonment, deepening West-East Malaysia divisions.
suggested_rewrite: Discussions about state autonomy within Malaysia's federal framework are legitimate constitutional conversations. They should be approached with mutual respect and understanding of historical agreements.

input_text: Lepas ni jangan hantar anak belajar kat universiti yang banyak kaum tu. Nanti terpengaruh dengan budaya diorang yang rosak. Pilih universiti yang majority kaum kita.
reason: Advocates educational segregation by discouraging enrolment in universities with other ethnic groups, labeling their culture as corrupt.
suggested_rewrite: Universiti yang pelbagai kaum memperkayakan pengalaman pembelajaran. Pilih universiti berdasarkan kualiti akademik, bukan komposisi kaum.

input_text: 看到那个马来网红说华人是蟑螂吗？这就是他们的真面目。所有马来人骨子里都是种族主义者。
reason: Uses one influencer's racist comment to label all Malays as inherently racist, escalating racial tensions through counter-generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 一个网红的种族主义言论不代表整个族群。应该谴责具体的歧视言行，而不是以偏概全地标签所有人。

input_text: Pendatang tanpa izin ni buat kedai haram kat tepi jalan. Ambil rezeki orang tempatan. Kalau jumpa, halau sendiri. Jangan tunggu majlis perbandaran.
reason: Encourages citizens to personally chase away undocumented street vendors rather than reporting to authorities, promoting xenophobic vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Isu peniaga tanpa lesen boleh dilaporkan kepada PBT untuk tindakan penguatkuasaan. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri kerana ia boleh menyebabkan konflik.

input_text: 这些马来女人戴头巾是被压迫的象征。她们被洗脑了，连自己被压迫都不知道。真可悲。
reason: Patronizingly dismisses hijab-wearing women as brainwashed and oppressed, denying their agency and disrespecting their religious choice.
suggested_rewrite: 头巾对许多穆斯林女性来说是自愿的宗教表达。尊重个人选择是多元社会的基本原则。

input_text: Journalist tu tulis pasal isu tanah Orang Asli. Pasti dia dapat duit dari NGO asing nak jatuhkan kerajaan. Kena expose siapa sponsor dia.
reason: Delegitimizes journalism about indigenous issues by falsely alleging foreign funding conspiracy and calling for exposing the journalist's sources.
suggested_rewrite: Wartawan yang melaporkan isu hak tanah Orang Asli memainkan peranan penting. Jika ada kebimbangan mengenai sumber dana, gunakan saluran rasmi, jangan serang wartawan.

input_text: My Malay friend told me the ustaz said we should avoid befriending non-Muslims. So much for 1Malaysia. These religious teachers are the real threat to unity.
reason: Uses secondhand anecdote to brand all religious teachers as threats to national unity, escalating from individual teaching to systemic condemnation.
suggested_rewrite: If a specific religious teacher promotes social isolation from other faiths, it should be addressed through proper religious authority channels, not used to condemn all religious educators.

input_text: 每次看到外劳在商场里，就觉得马来西亚变了。他们拉低了我们国家的水平。应该限制他们进入公共场所。
reason: Advocates restricting foreign workers from public spaces, dehumanizing them as lowering national standards based on their mere presence.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳对马来西亚经济有重要贡献。所有人都有权使用公共设施。歧视性限制违反基本人权原则。

input_text: That politician's daughter studies overseas using rakyat's money. Someone leak her Instagram la, let people see how she wastes taxpayer money living luxury life.
reason: Calls for leaking a politician's daughter's social media to publicly shame her, targeting a private individual for their parent's actions.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about misuse of public funds should be raised through proper oversight mechanisms like the PAC or MACC. A politician's family members deserve privacy protection.

input_text: Dah la ekonomi teruk, kerajaan masih nak bagi bantuan kat Rohingya. Duit rakyat habis kat pendatang haram. Orang Malaysia sendiri makan pasir.
reason: Frames humanitarian aid to Rohingya refugees as stealing from citizens, promoting xenophobic opposition to refugee assistance.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan mengenai dasar pelarian dan peruntukan bantuan perlu dilakukan secara rasional. Bantuan kemanusiaan dan kebajikan rakyat tempatan tidak semestinya bercanggah.

input_text: Masjid kat area Cina tu speaker dia kuat sangat subuh-subuh. Orang Cina mana tahan. Patut kurangkan volume, ni bukan negara Arab.
reason: Complains about mosque speakers in a way that dismisses Malaysia's Islamic character and frames azan as ethnic nuisance to Chinese communities.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi pembesar suara masjid boleh dibincangkan secara baik dengan jawatankuasa masjid dan pihak berkuasa tempatan tanpa menyentuh sensitiviti agama.

input_text: 那些马来学生进大学靠的是固打制，不是本事。这就是为什么他们毕业后找不到工作。
reason: Claims Malay students gain university admission only through quotas and are unemployable, combining affirmative action criticism with ethnic inferiority implications.
suggested_rewrite: 教育政策可以建设性地讨论。不应以招生政策来质疑任何族群学生的能力或价值。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் போலீஸ்காரங்க எல்லாரும் லஞ்சம் வாங்குறவங்க. நம்ம ஆளுங்களை மட்டும் target பண்றாங்க. இது racial profiling.
reason: Labels all Malay police officers as corrupt and accuses them of racial profiling, undermining institutional trust along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் மற்றும் இன ரீதியான பாரபட்சம் பற்றிய குறிப்பிட்ட புகார்களை IPCMC அல்லது தொடர்புடைய அதிகாரிகளிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். முழு காவல்துறையையும் ஒரே மாதிரியாக சித்தரிக்க வேண்டாம்.

input_text: Semua pekerja construction dari Indonesia ni pembawa penyakit. Kena wajibkan health screening setiap minggu, kalau tak hantar balik.
reason: Stigmatizes all Indonesian construction workers as disease carriers and demands excessive screening or deportation, promoting health-based xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: Kesihatan pekerja pembinaan penting untuk semua. Pemeriksaan kesihatan berkala perlu dijalankan untuk semua pekerja tanpa mengira kewarganegaraan, sebagai tanggungjawab majikan.

input_text: Don't trust the Chinese media in Malaysia. They only report news that benefits their community. It's all one-sided propaganda to undermine Malay interests.
reason: Dismisses all Chinese-language media as ethnic propaganda undermining Malay interests, attacking press diversity along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: All media outlets should be evaluated on their journalistic standards. A diverse media landscape including multiple languages strengthens democracy in a multicultural nation.

input_text: Orang tu baru je convert masuk Islam tapi still makan babi. Share la kat semua, biar dia malu. Murtad macam ni tak layak hidup.
reason: Publicly shames a convert for alleged non-compliance with Islamic dietary laws, exposing personal religious practices and declaring them unworthy of living.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan keagamaan setiap individu adalah peribadi. Jika ada keraguan tentang amalan seorang Muslim baru, bimbing mereka dengan kasih sayang, bukan dengan mendedahkan dan menghina.

input_text: We should create a database of all interracial couples in Malaysia. People need to know who is diluting our bloodline. Share if you agree!
reason: Advocates creating a surveillance database targeting interracial couples using 'bloodline purity' rhetoric, combining racial supremacy with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial marriages are a personal choice protected by law. Creating databases to monitor couples based on ethnicity is discriminatory and a serious privacy violation.

input_text: Dengar cerita ada sindiket Cina beli undi kat kampung Melayu untuk PRU ni. Tak boleh biarkan bangsa lain tentukan masa depan kita.
reason: Spreads unverified vote-buying conspiracy attributed to Chinese syndicates in Malay areas, undermining electoral trust along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan pembelian undi adalah serius dan perlu dilaporkan kepada SPR dengan bukti. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa asas yang boleh menjejaskan proses demokrasi.
